---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or a step off the roadmap
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what does it enable? If it's a latency
improvement, what's the expected impact and how would it be measured?

## Proposal

A clear description of the change you'd like. If it touches the hot path or a
lock-free data structure, note which
[invariants](../../CLAUDE.md#invariants--do-not-break-these) it interacts with.

## Roadmap fit

Does this relate to an existing
[roadmap](../../CLAUDE.md#roadmap--what-isnt-here-yet) item (real feed, signal
logic, real order submission, risk/position management, multi-instrument)? Or is
it something new?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you weighed, and why this one.
